one_line_thesis: Franco-Nevada is the largest listed gold royalty company: record cash generation, zero debt, and a deep acquisition pipeline.

deep_dive.executive_summary: Franco-Nevada is the largest listed gold royalty company: record cash generation, zero debt, and a deep acquisition pipeline. At $215.20 (NYSE, 2026-07-23), we expect 7.22% per year (total synthesis). Proof-backed component base value is $160.52 per share from filing-locked owner-cash and balance-sheet bridges. The Lawrence stance gate is below our accumulate bar. Moat is stable; dhando is partial. We propose watch.

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

low.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

components.label: Producing precious-metal royalty and stream cash flows

components.cross_check: Reconcile the range to primary filings, a reproducible owner-cash or NAV bridge, and the identified liability and capital claims before decision use.

components.label: Metal-price, operator, and realization reserve
components.assumption_summary: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
components.cross_check: Reconcile the range to primary filings, a reproducible owner-cash or NAV bridge, and the identified liability and capital claims before decision use.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of FNV, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted-average diluted shares 192.7M (FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/10249_Franco_Nevada_2025_Annual_Report_Ph14_F_Digital.pdf); Q1 2026 diluted 192.8M (FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/NR-Franco-Nevada-Reports-Record-Q1-2026-Results-vFinal-2026-05-12.pdf)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Producing precious-metal royalty and stream cash flows
valuation_proof.evidence: Proof base 142.1759/sh via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0; filings FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/10249_Franco_Nevada_2025_Annual_Report_Ph14_F_Digital.pdf and FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/NR-Franco-Nevada-Reports-Record-Q1-2026-Results-vFinal-2026-05-12.pdf.
valuation_proof.adjustment: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key producing_royalty_stream; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

valuation_proof.evidence: Proof base 18.34/sh via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0; filings FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/10249_Franco_Nevada_2025_Annual_Report_Ph14_F_Digital.pdf and FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/NR-Franco-Nevada-Reports-Record-Q1-2026-Results-vFinal-2026-05-12.pdf.
valuation_proof.adjustment: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key development_inventory_option; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

valuation_proof.evidence: Proof base 27.51/sh via net_asset_value@1.0; filings FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/10249_Franco_Nevada_2025_Annual_Report_Ph14_F_Digital.pdf and FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/NR-Franco-Nevada-Reports-Record-Q1-2026-Results-vFinal-2026-05-12.pdf.
valuation_proof.adjustment: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_financial_claims; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

valuation_proof.evidence: Proof base -27.5102/sh via net_asset_value@1.0; filings FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/10249_Franco_Nevada_2025_Annual_Report_Ph14_F_Digital.pdf and FNV/investor-documents/ir-fnv/NR-Franco-Nevada-Reports-Record-Q1-2026-Results-vFinal-2026-05-12.pdf.

valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

personas.falsifier: FCF yield < 0.5% or commoditized archetype (turnaround/optionality only)

personas.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%
personas.label: Mohnish Pabrai

personas.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)
personas.label: Murray Stahl

personas.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median
personas.label: Joel Greenblatt
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: earnings_yield_high, quality_proxy

personas.falsifier: Operating lens only — no dated inefficiency / catalyst
personas.label: John Mihaljevic / MOI

personas.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure
personas.label: Horizon Kinetics
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: asset_or_event, dated_payoff

personas.falsifier: Supply response, reinvestment requirements, or incremental returns cannot be measured.
personas.label: Marathon / Capital Returns

personas.falsifier: Debt maturities, refinancing exposure, liquidity, or downside recovery cannot be reconciled.
personas.label: Howard Marks / Oaktree

personas.falsifier: Asset value lacks an independently evidenced realization path or is already capitalized in operating cash flow.
personas.label: Klarman / Baupost

active_lenses.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

timeline.label: Tom Albanese appointed independent Chair after David Harquail stepped to Chair Emeritus at AGM
Record FY2025 results: $1.82B revenue, $1.49B operating cash flow, 519k GEOs; 2026 GEO guidance 510–570k
Agreed to acquire six royalties from Victoria Gold Corp. for C$55M (~$40M)
Raised quarterly dividend 16% to $0.44/sh ($1.76 annualized); 19th consecutive annual increase
Bullabulling gross royalty deal with Minerals 260 (~$120M) plus A$50M equity subscription
Hudbay closed Mitsubishi 30% JV in Copper World for $600M; FNV royalty exposure intact
Sold 26M Discovery Silver shares; gain recorded in shareholders' equity
Cobre Panamá contributed 11,208 GEOs in FY2025; GOP approved stockpile processing; full restart pending
Cascabel partial buy-back generated $55.1M adjusted net income in Q1 2026 (net of tax)
IPO on Toronto and New York exchanges under FNV; debt-free royalty model from launch

industry.structure: Gold-focused royalty and streaming is concentrated among Franco-Nevada, Wheaton, Royal Gold, and Osisko; barriers are deal origination, balance-sheet capacity, and portfolio diversification. Franco-Nevada holds the largest gold royalty book with no operating mines.
industry.share_shift: Franco-Nevada gained share through Cascabel buy-back, Antapaccay/Glencore stream, Victoria Gold portfolio, and Bullabulling; peers compete on precious-metals and energy diversification.
industry.trend: Record gold prices in 2025–2026 inflated royalty cash flows; oil price tailwind benefits diversified segment without proportionate cost inflation; Cobre Panamá restart and operator exploration spend on the royalty book are key organic growth levers.

top_claims.claim: Franco-Nevada is the largest listed gold royalty company: record cash generation, zero debt, and a deep acquisition pipeline. At $229.28 (NYSE, 2026-06-03), we expect 4.5% per year on the base seven-year owner-cash model (bull 9.3%; total synthesis 6.12%). FY2025 delivered $1.49 billion operating cash flow and 519k GEO
We expect **6.12%** per year over 7 years at **~$229.28** on **$7.75/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Precious metal price mean reversion from levels embedded in 2026 guidance ($4,500/oz gold assumption per NR).
Cobre Panamá restart delays or limited stockpile processing only.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Precious metal price mean reversion from levels embedded in 2026 guidance ($4,500/oz gold assumption per NR).
Cobre Panamá restart delays or limited stockpile processing only.
Operator disruptions at key assets (Antamina sequencing, underground transitions).
